summary: Iteration 33 - TV Dashboard feature testing complete. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 11 UI tests passed (100%). The TV Dashboard at /tv is fully functional without authentication, displaying real-time NOC monitoring data with dark theme, auto-refresh, and all required UI components.

backend_api: Response contains: timestamp, global_stats, clients, alerts, low_toner
global_stats has all 9 required fields (total_clients, total_devices, total_online, total_offline, total_alerts, critical_alerts, open_incidents, total_printers, low_toner_count)
clients array contains client summaries with health_pct, online, offline, connector_online, problem_devices
alerts array returns top 20 active alerts sorted by severity (critical -> high -> medium -> low)
low_toner array contains printers with supplies <= 15% with color_hex
timestamp is valid ISO format with timezone
Data consistency verified between global_stats and clients array sums
frontend_ui: /tv page accessible WITHOUT login (no redirect to /login)
Header: NOC logo, '86BIT NOC Center' title, real-time clock (HH:MM:SS)
Global status badge: 'ATTENZIONE' (red) when critical alerts exist, 'TUTTI OPERATIVI' (green) when all OK
Stats bar: 8 numeric blocks (Dispositivi, Online, Offline, Alert Critici, Alert Totali, Incidenti, Stampanti, Toner Basso)
Client cards: Ring gauge health percentage, online/offline/alert counters, connector status (CONNESSO/OFFLINE)
Alerts panel: Badge with count, severity colors (red=CRITICO, orange=ALTO, yellow=MEDIO, blue=BASSO)
Low toner section: 'CONSUMABILI BASSI' with colored toner bars and percentages
Footer: Auto-refresh info (15s), last update timestamp, client count
Fullscreen mode: No sidebar or navigation visible

critical_code_review_comments: TV Dashboard router properly registered in server.py (line 141: import, line 165: include_router)
Route /tv correctly placed outside Layout in App.js (line 194) - no auth wrapper
API endpoint /api/tv/dashboard has no auth dependency - correct for TV display setup
Alerts sorted by severity using severity_order dict
Low toner threshold correctly set at <= 15%
CSS uses CSS variables for consistent theming (--tv-green, --tv-red, --tv-amber, etc.)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Using existing demo data from iteration 32 (7 printers, 9 devices, 8 alerts).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 33 verified TV Dashboard feature: 1) Backend API /api/tv/dashboard works without auth, returns aggregated data for all clients. 2) Frontend /tv route accessible without login, shows fullscreen dark theme NOC display. 3) All 8 stat blocks display correctly. 4) Client cards show ring gauge health, connector status. 5) Alerts panel shows severity-colored alerts with auto-scroll. 6) Low toner section shows colored bars. 7) Footer shows auto-refresh (15s) and timestamp. 8) No sidebar visible (fullscreen mode).

mocked_apis.firebase_push: Firebase Cloud Messaging (push notifications) is MOCKED

components: Header (NOC logo, title, clock, global status badge)
Client cards (ring gauge, counters, connector status)
